violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The floors in various areas of the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings and or nesting material. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC cleaned areas at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by four dead mice and droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
Four dead mice were observed on glue boards. PIC stated mice will be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of rodent droppings. All food on bottom shelf was relocated. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

The floors in various areas of the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings and or nesting material. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the Milk cooler have an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the backroom area, is not tight-fitting. The bottom interior and exterior door sweeps were observed to be bent allowing for possible entrance of pests. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The milk shelving area has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023
